title: PluginCommandRunner
description: Used to run commands sent through plugin messaging
body:
# PluginCommandRunner This mod will listen for plugin messages on a channel and run any command if it matches the channel identifier. To make this work, you need to set the server name in the config file it creates on startup.

If you wish to make a mod that sends plugin messages, you need to use the channel identifier plugincommandrunner:main.

In addition, you need to include the following payload data: "PluginCommandRunner" and "", as this is used for validation. After those two, you can include a command.
